title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 5–7, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If... if anything happened to you...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I would feel like I had betrayed your parents!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: All that stuff usopp- San said was true...!!?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He alone knew the truth, and tried every- thing to warn us...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: After tomorrow, you will know the truth!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Just... take this chance to run! Please listen to me!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We've misunder- stood that man's good intentions...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He tried so hard to save this village but was instead chased away!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What have I ever done for him...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's no use... everyone went on vacation starting yesterday!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm your servant, how can I let you do my duties for me?

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
